description_long: This is a sleek, modern jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept wings. The aircraft features two rear-mounted turbofan engines positioned on either side of the tail section, which is painted black and contrasts with the otherwise white body. The wings are low-mounted and exhibit a noticeable sweep, with no visible winglets. The tail is configured in a T-tail design, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, with a smoothly contoured nose and darkened windows. The landing gear is not visible in these views, suggesting it is likely retractable and currently stowed.
description: A modern, white jet airplane with a black T-tail, low-swept wings, and twin rear-mounted engines. The cockpit is forward and streamlined, with no visible landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the black T-tail, and one of the rear-mounted engines clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, forward cockpit, wide wingspan, and both engines flanking the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other engine and the full profile of the swept wing and T-tail.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying both engines, the T-tail configuration, and the trailing edges of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy and dark windows.
